name: University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill
special_considerations: Restrictive Early Action — applicants may not apply EA or ED to other private schools if applying REA to UNC
In-state students make up ~82% of enrolled students by state legislative mandate; out-of-state applicants face an extremely competitive pool
Carolina Covenant program covers full cost of attendance (loans-free) for eligible students from families earning below 200% of the federal poverty line
Holistic review places heavy emphasis on essays, community engagement, and leadership — strong GPA/test scores are necessary but not sufficient

financial_aid.notes: Carolina Covenant: full cost of attendance (loans-free) for students with family income below 200% of federal poverty line. Need-blind for in-state applicants, need-aware for out-of-state. Meets 100% of need for all admitted domestic students.
